description: 金融投资分析证据标准 - 适用于 SIC/WGHS/YIS 等金融竞赛

unacceptable_source_types: outdated data (>2 years for current analysis)

logical_fallacies.name: 后见之明偏误
logical_fallacies.description: 用事后已知信息评价事前决策

logical_fallacies.name: 幸存者偏差
logical_fallacies.description: 仅基于现存成功案例得出结论

logical_fallacies.name: 近因偏误
logical_fallacies.description: 过度强调近期数据而忽视长期趋势

logical_fallacies.name: 相关误作因果
logical_fallacies.description: 将经济指标相关性误作因果关系

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏量化分析
fatal_defects.description: 全文无任何财务数据、比率计算或估值分析

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏风险分析
fatal_defects.description: 未讨论任何投资风险因素

fatal_defects.name: 缺乏对标分析
fatal_defects.description: 未列出对标公司/行业基准进行对比
